category_sources: Official Paperkey page describes long-term backup of OpenPGP keys and extracting secret bytes for reconstruction.
source_facts.description says it extracts secret information out of OpenPGP secret keys.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading is "Paperkey - an OpenPGP key archiver".
docs_sources: Official Paperkey page provides usage examples and says full option documentation is in the man page; it is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: GitHub repository title is dmshaw/paperkey and describes printing an OpenPGP key on paper for archive and recovery.
Official Paperkey page links to GitHub for earlier releases and usual GitHub project materials.
tags_sources: Official page states Paperkey works with OpenPGP/GnuPG/PGP keys and prints secret bytes for backup.
